extra.reason: Recorded translate-toolkit API research in docs/backlog-internal.md
Expanded docs/backlog-internal.md into a module-level translate-toolkit API inventory.
Implemented gettext/XLIFF scope guidance, toolkit-backed XLIFF application, language labels, and misc helper usage.
Added regression coverage for Chinese plural forms and XML/entity helper edge cases.
Fixed XLIFF filtering to skip done states even when target equals source; strings_zh-CN.xliff now selects 11 units.
Added opt-in Logfire instrumentation for Pydantic AI agent/model runs with CLI flags and tests.
